page: Microsoft Azure D16ads_v6 is a general-purpose virtual machine belonging to the Dadv6 family. It is powered by an AMD EPYC 9V74 processor utilizing the x86_64 architecture. The instance features 16 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 8 physical cores with multithreading enabled. It operates at a clock speed of 3.7 GHz and includes 64.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per vCPU. Local storage is bundled, offering 945 GB of temporary disk capacity, and the instance is Premium Storage capable.

Performance benchmarks indicate strong single-core capabilities, with stress-ng single-core CPU and Geekbench single-core scores placing in the top 25%. Text processing performance is particularly high, ranking in the top 10%. Multi-core performance, database operations, and cryptography tests fall within the average range. Memory bandwidth tests show average performance for cached small-block reads and large-block writes, though uncached large-block reads are relatively weak, placing in the bottom 25%.

Given its balanced resource allocation and dedicated CPU cores, this server offers solid qualitative cost efficiency for general-purpose workloads that require a mix of compute, memory, and local storage. The bundled 945 GB local disk reduces the need for external storage attachments for temporary data. It is well-suited for applications such as web serving, database operations, software compilation, and text processing pipelines.
description: The Microsoft Azure D16ads_v6 is a general-purpose virtual machine from the Dadv6 family, powered by an x86_64 AMD EPYC 9V74 processor. It features 16 dedicated vCPUs running at 3.7 GHz, 64.0 GB of RAM, and a bundled 945 GB local disk. Benchmark results show strong single-core CPU performance and top-tier text processing capabilities, while multi-core execution, database operations, and memory write bandwidth perform at average levels. Uncached large-block memory reads represent a performance bottleneck, scoring in the bottom 25%. This instance provides a balanced resource profile, making it qualitatively cost-efficient for workloads requiring local temporary storage. It is highly suitable for web serving, software compilation, database hosting, and general-purpose business applications.
og_description: Microsoft Azure D16ads_v6 is a general-purpose VM featuring 16 dedicated AMD EPYC vCPUs, 64 GB RAM, and a 945 GB local disk, delivering strong single-core performance for databases and web serving.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure D16ads_v6 is a general-purpose VM with 16 AMD EPYC vCPUs, 64 GB RAM, and 945 GB local storage, optimized for balanced workloads.
tagline: A balanced general-purpose virtual machine featuring dedicated AMD EPYC processors, high single-core performance, and integrated local SSD storage.

64.0 GB of system memory providing a balanced 4.0 GB per vCPU
945 GB of bundled local storage with Premium Storage capability
Strong single-core CPU and top-tier text processing benchmark results
